items.name: 十勝駒踊
items.description: 大正5年に、十勝種馬所の職員らにより始められた。洞内南部駒踊を継承し、毎年駒場神社の秋祭りに奉納される。

en.description_en: This is a folk cultural property (folk performing art) consisting of the Tokachi horse dance (komaodori). It is a town-designated cultural property of Otofuke Town, maintained by the Tokachi Horse Dance Preservation Society.

items.name: 東士狩獅子舞
items.description: 郷里富山県から道具衣装を取り寄せ、明治35年に始められた。毎年東士狩神社の秋祭りに奉納。獅子は「百足獅子」。

en.description_en: This is a folk cultural property (folk performing art) consisting of the Higashishikari lion dance (shishimai). It is a town-designated cultural property of Otofuke Town, maintained by the Higashishikari Lion Dance Preservation Society.

items.name: 矢部獅子舞
items.description: 郷里富山県での経験者が指導者になり、明治37年に始められた。毎年住吉神社の秋祭りに奉納。獅子は「百足獅子」。

en.description_en: This is a folk cultural property (folk performing art) consisting of the Yabe lion dance (shishimai). It is a town-designated cultural property of Otofuke Town, maintained by the Yabe Lion Dance Preservation Society.

items.name: 十勝坊主
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 字東音更東6線41番地　所有者：音更町
items.description: 2～4千年前の寒冷期に生成した化石土。土まんじゅうの形で群生をなし、この地に300個余りが確認されている。

en.description_en: This is a monument (patterned ground) consisting of the Tokachi Bozu, a formation of patterned ground. It is a town-designated cultural property of Otofuke Town, located at Higashiotofuke Higashi 6-sen 41, owned by Otofuke Town.
